<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" data-theme="dark"><head><meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=UTF-8">

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Agent Marketplace</title>
<style>
  :root{
    /* Material Design 2 Color System - Dark Theme */
    --primary: #1976D2; /* colors.blue.darken1 */
    --secondary: #FF9800; /* colors.orange.darken1 */
    --error: #F44336;
    --warning: #FF5722;
    --info: #03a9f4;
    --success: #4CAF50;
    --cfx3rdlevel: #313946;
    --cfxcard: #282F3A;
    --cfxbackground: #161B21;
    --cfxreportheader: #1565C0; /* colors.blue.darken4 */
    --cfxtabtext: #E0E0E0; /* colors.grey.lighten2 */
    --cfxtext: #FAFAFA; /* colors.grey.lighten4 */
    --cfxgrey: #282F3A;
    --cfxlinkhover: #0D47A1; /* colors.blue.darken3 */
    
    /* Derived colors */
    --bg: var(--cfxbackground);
    --bg-secondary: var(--cfxcard);
    --card: var(--cfxcard);
    --text: var(--cfxtext);
    --text-secondary: var(--cfxtabtext);
    --text-muted: #9E9E9E;
    --border: var(--cfx3rdlevel);
    --accent: var(--primary);
    --accent-hover: var(--cfxlinkhover);
    --accent-light: rgba(144,202,249,.12);
    --accent-border: rgba(144,202,249,.24);
    --green: var(--success);
    --red: var(--error);
    --shadow: rgba(0,0,0,.3);
    
    /* Material Design 2 Elevation */
    --elevation-0: 0px 0px 0px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0);
    --elevation-1: 0px 2px 1px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 1px 1px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 1px 3px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-2: 0px 3px 1px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 2px 2px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 1px 5px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-3: 0px 3px 3px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 3px 4px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 1px 8px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-4: 0px 2px 4px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 4px 5px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 1px 10px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-6: 0px 3px 5px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 6px 10px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 1px 18px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-8: 0px 5px 5px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 8px 10px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 3px 14px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-12: 0px 7px 8px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 12px 17px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 5px 22px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-16: 0px 8px 10px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 16px 24px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 6px 30px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-24: 0px 11px 15px -7px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 24px 38px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 9px 46px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  }

  [data-theme="light"]{
    /* Material Design 2 Color System - Light Theme */
    --primary: #1976D2; /* colors.blue.darken1 */
    --secondary: #FF9800; /* colors.orange.base */
    --error: #D32F2F; /* colors.red.darken1 */
    --warning: #FF5722;
    --info: #03a9f4;
    --success: #4CAF50;
    --cfx3rdlevel: #F7F7F7;
    --cfxcard: #FFFFFF;
    --cfxbackground: #f9f9f9;
    --cfxreportheader: #E3F2FD; /* colors.blue.lighten5 */
    --cfxtabtext: #424242; /* colors.grey.darken1 */
    --cfxtext: #212121; /* colors.grey.darken4 */
    --cfxgrey: #757575; /* colors.grey.base */
    --cfxlinkhover: #0D47A1; /* colors.blue.darken3 */
    
    /* Derived colors */
    --bg: var(--cfxbackground);
    --bg-secondary: var(--cfxcard);
    --card: var(--cfxcard);
    --text: var(--cfxtext);
    --text-secondary: var(--cfxtabtext);
    --text-muted: var(--cfxgrey);
    --border: #E0E0E0;
    --accent: var(--primary);
    --accent-hover: var(--cfxlinkhover);
    --accent-light: rgba(25,118,210,.08);
    --accent-border: rgba(25,118,210,.24);
    --green: var(--success);
    --red: var(--error);
    --shadow: rgba(0,0,0,.12);
    
    /* Light theme elevation adjustments */
    --elevation-0: 0px 0px 0px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0);
    --elevation-1: 0px 2px 1px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 1px 1px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 1px 3px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-2: 0px 3px 1px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 2px 2px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 1px 5px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-3: 0px 3px 3px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 3px 4px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 1px 8px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-4: 0px 2px 4px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 4px 5px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 1px 10px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-6: 0px 3px 5px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 6px 10px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 1px 18px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-8: 0px 5px 5px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 8px 10px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 3px 14px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-12: 0px 7px 8px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 12px 17px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 5px 22px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-16: 0px 8px 10px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 16px 24px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 6px 30px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --elevation-24: 0px 11px 15px -7px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 24px 38px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 9px 46px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  }

  *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
  html,body{height:100%;overflow:hidden;width:100%}
  body{
    background:var(--bg);
    color:var(--text);
    font-family: "Avenir", "Avenir Next", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: 0.00938em;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
    -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
    transition:background .3s ease, color .3s ease;
  }

  /* Material Design 2 Typography Scale */
  .text-h1 { font-size: 6rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.167; letter-spacing: -0.01562em; }
  .text-h2 { font-size: 3.75rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: -0.00833em; }
  .text-h3 { font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.167; letter-spacing: 0em; }
  .text-h4 { font-size: 2.125rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.235; letter-spacing: 0.00735em; }
  .text-h5 { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.334; letter-spacing: 0em; }
  .text-h6 { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.6; letter-spacing: 0.0075em; }
  .text-subtitle1 { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.75; letter-spacing: 0.00938em; }
  .text-subtitle2 { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.57; letter-spacing: 0.00714em; }
  .text-body1 { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.00938em; }
  .text-body2 { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.43; letter-spacing: 0.01071em; }
  .text-button { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.75; letter-spacing: 0.02857em; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .text-caption { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.66; letter-spacing: 0.03333em; }
  .text-overline { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 2.66; letter-spacing: 0.08333em; text-transform: uppercase; }

  .container{
    display:flex;
    height:100vh;
    position:relative;
    min-height:100vh;
    flex-direction:column;
  }

  .main-content{
    flex:1;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    overflow:hidden;
    transition:margin-right .3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    min-width:0;
    width:100%;
  }

  .main-content.pane-open{
    margin-right:520px;
  }

  .top-bar{
    padding: 0 16px;
    background: var(--card);
    color: var(--text);
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    align-items: center;
    box-shadow: var(--elevation-4);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 50;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    min-height: 64px;
    height: 64px;
  }

  .search-wrapper{
    position:relative;
    flex:1;
    max-width:600px;
    min-width:200px;
  }

  .search-icon{
    position:absolute;
    left:16px;
    top:50%;
    transform:translateY(-50%);
    color:var(--text-muted);
    pointer-events:none;
  }

  .search-input{
    width:100%;
    padding: 8px 16px 8px 48px;
    background: var(--cfx3rdlevel);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 4px;
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 16px;
    font-family: inherit;
    outline: none;
    transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  }

  .search-input::placeholder{
    color: var(--text-muted);
  }

  .search-input:focus{
    background: var(--cfx3rdlevel);
    border-color: var(--primary);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(25,118,210,0.2);
  }

  .top-bar-actions{
    display:flex;
    gap:12px;
    align-items:center;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    min-width:0;
    margin-left:auto;
    margin-right:48px;
  }

  .theme-toggle{
    display: none;
  }

  .theme-toggle svg{
    width:20px;
    height:20px;
  }

  .sort-select{
    padding: 8px 32px 8px 16px;
    background: var(--cfx3rdlevel);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 4px;
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: inherit;
    outline: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    appearance: none;
    transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    min-width: 180px;
    background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="%239E9E9E" stroke-width="2"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg>');
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-position: right 12px center;
  }

  .sort-select:hover, .sort-select:focus{
    background: var(--cfx3rdlevel);
    border-color: var(--primary);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(25,118,210,0.2);
  }

  .sort-select:focus{
    outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
    outline-offset: 2px;
  }

  .sort-select option{
    background:var(--card);
    color:var(--text);
  }

  .sections-container{
    flex:1;
    overflow-y:auto;
    overflow-x:hidden;
    padding:28px 32px;
  }

  .search-results-container{
    display:none;
  }

  .search-results-container.active{
    display:block;
  }

  .sections-container.search-active .category-section{
    display:none;
  }

  .search-results-grid{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:32px;
  }

  .search-category-group{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:16px;
  }

  .search-category-header{
    font-size:clamp(14px, 2.2vw, 16px);
    font-weight:700;
    color:var(--text);
    padding:12px 0;
    border-bottom:2px solid var(--accent);
    letter-spacing:.3px;
  }

  .search-category-tiles{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(340px,1fr));
    gap:20px;
  }

  /* Flexbox fallback for search category tiles */
  @supports not (display: grid) {
    .search-category-tiles{
      display:flex;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      gap:20px;
    }
    .search-category-tiles .card{
      flex:1 1 340px;
      max-width:calc(50% - 10px);
    }
  }

  .search-header{
    margin-bottom:24px;
    padding-bottom:16px;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .search-header h2{
    font-size:clamp(16px, 2.5vw, 18px);
    color:var(--text);
    font-weight:700;
  }

  .search-header .count{
    color:var(--text-secondary);
    font-size:clamp(12px, 1.8vw, 14px);
    margin-top:6px;
  }

  .category-section{
    margin-bottom:28px;
    overflow:visible;
  }

  .section-header{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
    padding:16px 20px;
    background:var(--card);
    border:none;
    border-radius:4px;
    cursor:pointer;
    transition:all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    user-select:none;
    margin-bottom:16px;
    box-shadow:var(--elevation-2);
    min-height:44px;
  }

  .section-header:hover{
    background:var(--accent-light);
    box-shadow:var(--elevation-4);
  }

  .section-header:focus{
    outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
    outline-offset: 2px;
  }

  .section-title{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:12px;
  }

  .section-title h2{
    font-size:clamp(14px, 2.2vw, 16px);
    font-weight:700;
    color:var(--text);
  }

  .section-count{
    background:var(--accent-light);
    padding:4px 10px;
    border-radius:12px;
    font-size:clamp(10px, 1.5vw, 12px);
    font-weight:700;
    color:var(--accent);
    border:1px solid var(--accent-border);
  }

  .toggle-icon{
    transition:transform .3s;
    color:var(--text-secondary);
    font-size:18px;
  }

  .section-header.collapsed .toggle-icon{
    transform:rotate(-90deg);
  }

  .section-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(340px,1fr));
    gap:20px;
    max-height:2000px;
    overflow:visible;
    transition:max-height .3s ease, opacity .3s ease, visibility .3s ease;
    opacity:1;
    visibility:visible;
    pointer-events:auto;
  }

  /* Flexbox fallback for older browsers */
  @supports not (display: grid) {
    .section-grid{
      display:flex;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      gap:20px;
    }
    .section-grid .card{
      flex:1 1 340px;
      max-width:calc(50% - 10px);
    }
  }

  .section-grid.collapsed{
    max-height:0 !important;
    height:0 !important;
    min-height:0 !important;
    opacity:0;
    overflow:hidden;
    pointer-events:none;
    visibility:hidden;
    margin:0 !important;
    padding:0 !important;
    border:none;
    gap:0;
  }
  
  .section-grid.collapsed .card{
    pointer-events:none !important;
    cursor:default !important;
    opacity:0;
    height:0;
    min-height:0;
    margin:0;
    padding:0;
  }
  
  .category-section .section-grid.collapsed{
    margin-bottom:0;
  }

  .card{
    position:relative;
    background:var(--card);
    border:none;
    border-radius:20px;
    padding:16px;
    transition:all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    cursor:pointer;
    overflow:visible;
    box-shadow:var(--elevation-2);
    min-height:200px;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    width:100%;
    max-width:100%;
  }
  
  .card:hover{
    box-shadow:var(--elevation-8);
    transform:translateY(-2px);
  }

  .card:active{
    transform:translateY(0);
    box-shadow:var(--elevation-4);
  }

  .card:focus{
    outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
    outline-offset: 2px;
  }

  .card.hidden{display:none}

  .fav{
    position:absolute;
    top:8px;
    right:8px;
    background:var(--card);
    border:none;
    border-radius:50%;
    padding:8px;
    cursor:pointer;
    color:var(--text-muted);
    z-index:10;
    transition:all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    width:40px;
    height:40px;
    display:grid;
    place-items:center;
    box-shadow:var(--elevation-2);
  }
  
  .fav:hover{
    color:var(--text);
    background:var(--accent-light);
    box-shadow:var(--elevation-4);
  }

  .fav:focus{
    outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
    outline-offset: 2px;
  }
  
  .fav svg{
    width:20px;
    height:20px;
    fill:none;
    stroke:currentColor;
    stroke-width:2.5;
    transition:all .2s;
  }
  
  .fav.active{
    color:var(--primary);
    background:var(--accent-light);
  }
  
  .fav.active svg{
    fill:var(--primary);
    stroke:var(--primary);
  }

  .head{
    display:flex;
    align-items:flex-start;
    gap:12px;
    margin-bottom:16px;
    padding-right:40px;
    flex-shrink:0;
  }

  .icon-wrap{
    width:48px;
    height:48px;
    border-radius:4px;
    display:grid;
    place-items:center;
    background:var(--accent-light);
    flex-shrink:0;
  }

  .icon-wrap svg{
    width:24px;
    height:24px;
    stroke:var(--accent);
    stroke-width:2;
    stroke-linecap:round;
    stroke-linejoin:round;
    fill:none;
  }

  .title-area{
    min-width:0;
    flex:1;
    overflow:hidden;
  }

  .name{
    font-size:clamp(14px, 2.2vw, 16px);
    font-weight:600;
    margin:0 0 6px;
    color:var(--text);
    line-height:1.4;
    word-wrap:break-word;
    overflow-wrap:break-word;
  }

  .badge{
    display:inline-block;
    font-size:12px;
    padding:4px 8px;
    border-radius:16px;
    color:white;
    background:#6200EE;
    font-weight:500;
    letter-spacing:0.4px;
    text-transform:uppercase;
  }

  .meta{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);
    gap:12px;
    margin-top:auto;
    padding-top:16px;
    border-top:1px solid var(--border);
    font-size:clamp(10px, 1.6vw, 12px);
    flex-shrink:0;
    min-width:0;
  }

  /* Flexbox fallback for meta grid */
  @supports not (display: grid) {
    .meta{
      display:flex;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      gap:12px;
    }
    .meta .kv{
      flex:1 1 calc(50% - 6px);
      min-width:120px;
    }
    .meta .state-indicator{
      flex:1 1 100%;
    }
  }

  .kv{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:4px;
    min-width:0;
  }

  .kv.desc{ grid-column:1/-1 }

  .k{
    color:var(--text-muted);
    font-size:clamp(8px, 1.2vw, 10px);
    font-weight:600;
    letter-spacing:.5px;
    text-transform:uppercase;
  }

  .v{
    color:var(--text);
    font-size:clamp(11px, 1.8vw, 13px);
    font-weight:500;
  }

  .v.desc-truncate{ overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap }

  .state-indicator{
    grid-column:1/-1;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    padding:8px 12px;
    background:var(--cfx3rdlevel);
    border-radius:4px;
    font-size:12px;
    font-weight:500;
  }

  .dot{
    width:6px;
    height:6px;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--green);
  }

  .state-indicator.disabled{
    color:var(--red);
  }

  .state-indicator.disabled .dot{
    background:var(--red);
  }

  .state-indicator:not(.disabled){
    color:var(--green);
  }

  .empty-section{
    text-align:center;
    padding:40px 20px;
    color:var(--text-muted);
    font-size:clamp(12px, 2vw, 14px);
  }

  .side-pane{
    position:fixed;
    top:0;
    right:-520px;
    width:520px;
    max-width:100vw;
    height:100vh;
    background:var(--card);
    border:none;
    box-shadow:var(--elevation-16);
    overflow-y:auto;
    transition:right .3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    z-index:100;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    min-width:0;
  }

  .side-pane.open{
    right:0;
  }

  .pane-header{
    position:sticky;
    top:0;
    background:var(--card);
    padding:24px;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    display:flex;
    align-items:flex-start;
    gap:16px;
    z-index:10;
    box-shadow:var(--elevation-2);
    flex-shrink:0;
    min-width:0;
  }

  .close-btn{
    background:transparent;
    border:none;
    border-radius:50%;
    color:var(--text-secondary);
    cursor:pointer;
    padding:8px;

  .tabs-wrapper{

    transition:transform .3s ease;
    flex-wrap:nowrap;
    min-width:0;
  }

  .tab-btn{
    padding:12px 16px;
    background:transparent;
    border:none;
    color:var(--text-secondary);
    font-size:14px;
    font-weight:500;
    cursor:pointer;
    transition:all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    white-space:nowrap;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    letter-spacing:0.4px;
    border-radius:4px;
    position:relative;
    flex-shrink:0;
    min-width:0;
    min-height:44px;
  }

  .tab-btn:hover{
    color:var(--text);
    background:var(--accent-light);
  }

  .tab-btn:focus{
    outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
    outline-offset: 2px;
  }

  .tab-btn.active{
    color:var(--primary);
    background:var(--accent-light);
  }

  .tab-btn.active::after{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    bottom:0;
    left:0;
    right:0;
    height:2px;
    background:var(--primary);
  }

  .tab-nav-btn{
    position:absolute;
    top:50%;
    transform:translateY(-50%);
    width:40px;
    height:40px;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--card);
    border:none;
    display:grid;
    place-items:center;
    cursor:pointer;
    transition:all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    z-index:5;
    color:var(--text-secondary);
    box-shadow:var(--elevation-2);
  }

  .tab-nav-btn:hover{
    background:var(--accent-light);
    color:var(--primary);
    box-shadow:var(--elevation-4);
  }

  .tab-nav-btn:focus{
    outline: 2px solid var(--primary);
    outline-offset: 2px;
  }

  .tab-nav-btn.left{

  }

  .tab-nav-btn.right{
    right:-8px;
  }

  .tab-nav-btn.hidden{
    display:none;
  }

  .tab-nav-btn svg{
    width:16px;
    height:16px;
  }

  .tab-content{

    to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
  }

  .tab-section{

  .tab-section-title{

    padding:8px;

    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;

  .gallery-item:hover{

  .gallery-item:focus{

  .gallery-item img{
    width:100%;

    left:50%;
    transform:translate(-50%, -50%);

    pointer-events:none;
    display:block;

  .image-loading-spinner svg{
    display:block;
    width:32px;
    height:32px;
  }
  
  @keyframes spin{
    from{transform:translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(0deg);}
    to{transform:translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(360deg);}
  }
  
  @keyframes rotate{
    from{transform:rotate(0deg);}
    to{transform:rotate(360deg);}
  }

<script>
  const icons = {
    bot: '<path d="M12 2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2c0 .74-.4 1.39-1 1.73V7h1a7 7 0 0 1 7 7h1a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v3a1 1 0 0 1-1 1h-1a7 7 0 0 1-7 7H9a7 7 0 0 1-7-7H1a1 1 0 0 1-1-1v-3a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h1a7 7 0 0 1 7-7h1V5.73c-.6-.34-1-.99-1-1.73a2 2 0 0 1 2-2z"/><circle cx="9" cy="13" r="1"/><circle cx="15" cy="13" r="1"/>',

    box: '<path d="M21 16V8a2 2 0 0 0-1-1.73l-7-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 0l-7 4A2 2 0 0 0 3 8v8a2 2 0 0 0 1 1.73l7 4a2 2 0 0 0 2 0l7-4A2 2 0 0 0 21 16z"/><polyline points="3.27 6.96 12 12.01 20.73 6.96"/><line x1="12" y1="22.08" x2="12" y2="12"/>' ,
    pen: '<path d="M17 3a2.83 2.83 0 1 1 4 4L7.5 20.5 2 22l1.5-5.5L17 3z"/>',
    globe: '<circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/>',
    toolbox: '<path d="M5 4h14a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v5a1 1 0 0 1-1 1H4a1 1 0 0 1-1-1V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2z"/><path d="M3 12h18v7a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-7z"/><path d="M10 6V4a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h2a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v2"/>',
    user: '<path d="M20 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H8a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="12" cy="7" r="4"/>',
    satellite: '<path d="M13 7 9 3 5 7l4 4 4-4z"/><path d="m17 11 4 4-4 4-4-4 4-4z"/><path d="m8 12 4 4 6-6-4-4-6 6z"/><path d="M3 21a9 9 0 0 0 9-9"/>',
    chart: '<line x1="18" y1="20" x2="18" y2="10"/><line x1="12" y1="20" x2="12" y2="4"/><line x1="6" y1="20" x2="6" y2="14"/>',
    shield: '<path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/>'
  };

  // @ts-ignore - Jinja2 template syntax (processed server-side before JS execution)
  {# Extract USER_AI_PROJECTS from context using Jinja2 template syntax #}
  {%- set user_ai_projects = [] -%}
  {# Debug: Log what's available in context #}
  {# Priority 1: Get USER_AI_PROJECTS from all_variables.context #}
  {%- if all_variables and all_variables.get("context") -%}
    {%- if all_variables.context.get("USER_AI_PROJECTS") -%}
      {%- set user_ai_projects = all_variables.context.get("USER_AI_PROJECTS") -%}
    {%- endif -%}
  {# Priority 2: Get USER_AI_PROJECTS from direct context variable #}
  {%- elif context and context.get("USER_AI_PROJECTS") -%}
    {%- set user_ai_projects = context.get("USER_AI_PROJECTS") -%}
  {# Priority 3: Get USER_AI_PROJECTS from request_args (query parameters) #}
  {%- elif all_variables and all_variables.get("request_args") and all_variables.request_args.get("USER_AI_PROJECTS") -%}
    {%- set user_ai_projects = all_variables.request_args.get("USER_AI_PROJECTS") -%}
  {%- endif -%}

  // Initialize USER_AI_PROJECTS from Jinja2 template variable
  const userAIProjects = {{ user_ai_projects | tojson }};
  console.log('🔍 Debug - User AI Projects from context:', userAIProjects);
  console.log('🔍 Debug - userAIProjects type:', typeof userAIProjects);
  console.log('🔍 Debug - userAIProjects length:', userAIProjects ? userAIProjects.length : 0);

  let agents = [];
  let categoryMap = {};

  async function loadData() {
  try {
    console.log("🔄 Loading agent data...");
    
    // Build CFXQL query to filter by user's assigned projects
    let cfxqlQuery = '';
    if (userAIProjects && userAIProjects.length > 0) {
      // Build OR condition: ai_project_name is 'project1' OR ai_project_name is 'project2' ...
      const projectConditions = userAIProjects.map(project => `ai_project_name is '${project}'`).join(' OR ');
      cfxqlQuery = `(${projectConditions})`;
      console.log("🔍 Filtering agents by user projects:", userAIProjects);
      console.log("🔍 CFXQL Query:", cfxqlQuery);
    } else {
      console.warn("⚠️ No user projects found - loading all agents");
    }
    
    // Build API URL with CFXQL query if available
    let apiUrl = `/api/v2/pstreams/pstream/agent_catalogue_data/data?limit=1000`;
    if (cfxqlQuery) {
      apiUrl += `&cfxql_query=${encodeURIComponent(cfxqlQuery)}`;
    }
    
    const [agentsRes, categoriesRes] = await Promise.all([

      // Helper to safely parse JSON-like strings
      const parseField = (field) => {
      try {
        if (typeof agent[field] === "string") {
          const value = agent[field].trim();
          
          // If it's already a valid JSON array/object string, parse it directly
          if ((value.startsWith('[') && value.endsWith(']')) || 
              (value.startsWith('{') && value.endsWith('}'))) {
            try {
              return JSON.parse(value);
            } catch (e) {
              // If direct parse fails, try cleaning
            }
          }
          
          // Fix escaped backslashes and single quotes for non-standard formats
          const cleaned = value
            .replaceAll("\\'", "'")
            .replace(/'/g, '"')
            .replaceAll('"{', '{')

        // Ensure path starts with / if it doesn't already
        let filePath = path.trim();
        if (!filePath.startsWith('/')) {

        return `/api/v2/object_storage/file?path=${encodeURIComponent(filePath)}`;

      // Parse personas and workflows (stored as arrays in stream)

      // Helper to ensure we get an array from various formats
      const ensurePersonaArray = (value) => {
        if (!value) return [];
        if (Array.isArray(value)) return value;
        if (typeof value === 'string') {
          const str = value;
          // Try parsing as JSON array first (format: '["Service Desk", "DataOps"]')

          }
          // If it's a comma-separated string (but NOT a JSON array), split it
          if (!str.trim().startsWith('[') && str.includes(',')) {
            // DO NOT TRIM - only remove surrounding quotes, preserve spaces
            return str.split(',').map(p => p.replace(/^["']|["']$/g, '')).filter(p => p && p.length > 0);
          }
          // Single string value - preserve as-is (no trim)
          return str.length > 0 ? [str] : [];
        }
        return [];
      };
      
      let parsedPersonas = parseField("personas");
      let parsedAiPersonas = parseField("ai_personas");
      
      // Ensure arrays and deduplicate (filter out empty/null values)

      const aiPersonasArray = ensurePersonaArray(parsedAiPersonas);
      
      // DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces in persona names

      console.log('🔍 Parsed personas:', agent.personas, 'from:', parsedPersonas);

      // Parse workflows similarly - use same helper as personas
      // IMPORTANT: DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces in workflow names
      const ensureWorkflowArray = (value) => {
        if (!value) return [];
        if (Array.isArray(value)) return value;
        if (typeof value === 'string') {
          const str = value;
          // Try parsing as JSON array first (format: '["workflow1", "workflow2"]')
          if (str.trim().startsWith('[') && str.trim().endsWith(']')) {
            try {

              // DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces

            } catch (e) {

          }
          // If it's a comma-separated string (but NOT a JSON array), split it
          if (!str.trim().startsWith('[') && str.includes(',')) {
            // DO NOT TRIM - only remove surrounding quotes, preserve spaces
            return str.split(',').map(p => p.replace(/^["']|["']$/g, '')).filter(p => p && p.length > 0);
          }
          // Single string value - preserve as-is (no trim)
          return str.length > 0 ? [str] : [];
        }
        return [];
      };
      
      let parsedWorkflows = parseField("workflows");
      let parsedAiWorkflows = parseField("ai_workflows");
      
      // Ensure arrays and deduplicate (filter out empty/null values)
      // DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces in workflow names
      const workflowsArray = ensureWorkflowArray(parsedWorkflows);
      const aiWorkflowsArray = ensureWorkflowArray(parsedAiWorkflows);
      
      // DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces in workflow names
      agent.workflows = [...new Set(workflowsArray.map(w => String(w)).filter(w => w && w.length > 0))];
      agent.ai_workflows = [...new Set(aiWorkflowsArray.map(w => String(w)).filter(w => w && w.length > 0))];
      
      console.log('🔍 Parsed workflows:', agent.workflows, 'from:', parsedWorkflows);
      console.log('🔍 Parsed ai_workflows:', agent.ai_workflows, 'from:', parsedAiWorkflows);

      // Initialize MinIO file arrays (will be populated by loadMinioFiles)
      agent.images = [];

      agent.videos = [];

      // Process documents with minio URL conversion
      if (Array.isArray(agent.documents) && agent.documents.length > 0) {

  // Helper to fetch file list from MinIO.
  // path must be the full folder path: agent_catalog/<agent_id>/<folder_type> (e.g. agent_catalog/test-dd270d32/images).
  // Do NOT pass only the base folder; the API requires the complete path.
  async function fetchFileList(path) {
    if (!path || path.trim() === '') return [];
    
    try {
                // Use the complete folder path for the API (do NOT truncate to base folder).
                // Expected format: agent_catalog/<agent_id>/<folder_type> (e.g. agent_catalog/test-dd270d32/images).
                // Remove leading slash if present.
      let folderPath = path.trim();
      if (folderPath.startsWith('/')) {
        folderPath = folderPath.substring(1);
      }
      
                // cfxql_query: filter by full folder path
      const cfxqlQuery = `folder is '${folderPath}'`;
      
      // Pass the complete folder path to the API (do NOT truncate). Format: agent_catalog/<agent_id>/<folder_type>
      const url = `/api/v2/object_storage/folder?folder_path=${encodeURIComponent(folderPath)}&cfxql_query=${encodeURIComponent(cfxqlQuery)}&limit=100`;
      const response = await fetch(url, {
        method: 'GET',
        headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }
      });
      
      if (!response.ok) {
        console.warn(`Failed to fetch file list for path ${path}:`, response.status);
        return [];
      }
      
      const data = await response.json();
      
      // Debug: Log the response structure to understand the API format
      if (!data.objects && !data.data && !data.items && !data.results && !data.rda_objects) {
        console.warn(`⚠️ Unexpected API response structure for path ${path}:`, Object.keys(data));
        console.log('Full response:', data);
      }
      
      // Try different possible response field names
      // The API returns data in: rda_objects, objects, data, items, results, or directly as an array
      const fileList = data.rda_objects || data.objects || data.data || data.items || data.results || 
                       (Array.isArray(data) ? data : []);
      
      if (fileList.length === 0 && data.num_items > 0) {
        console.warn(`⚠️ API reports ${data.num_items} items but fileList is empty for path ${path}`);
        console.log(`🔍 Available fields in response:`, Object.keys(data));
        console.log(`🔍 Checking rda_objects:`, data.rda_objects ? `${data.rda_objects.length} items` : 'not found');
      }
      
      return fileList;
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn(`Error fetching file list for path ${path}:`, err);
      return [];
    }
  }

  // Helper to fetch file content and convert to data URL
  // fileType: Optional file type from API response (e.g., 'png', 'pdf') - more reliable than parsing filename
  async function fetchFileAsDataUrl(filePath, fileType = null) {
    try {
      // New API: path is a query parameter (data_path from API response)
      // Path should NOT have leading slash - use as-is from data_path
      // Note: .data files contain the actual binary content (images, PDFs, etc.)
      // When fetched, they return the binary content, which is correct behavior
      const path = filePath.trim();
      
      const url = `/api/v2/object_storage/file?path=${encodeURIComponent(path)}`;
      const response = await fetch(url, {
        method: 'GET',
        headers: { 'Accept': '*/*' }
      });
      
      if (!response.ok) {
        const errorText = await response.text().catch(() => 'Unable to read error response');
        console.error(`❌ Failed to fetch file ${filePath}:`, {
          status: response.status,
          statusText: response.statusText,
          error: errorText.substring(0, 200) // First 200 chars of error
        });
        return null;
      }
      
      // Get content type from response header, fileType parameter, or infer from filename
      let contentType = response.headers.get('content-type');
      const fileName = filePath.split('/').pop() || '';
      
      // Map file types to MIME types
      const mimeTypes = {
        'jpg': 'image/jpeg',
        'jpeg': 'image/jpeg',
        'png': 'image/png',
        'gif': 'image/gif',
        'webp': 'image/webp',
        'pdf': 'application/pdf',
        'mp4': 'video/mp4',
        'webm': 'video/webm',
        'mp3': 'audio/mpeg',
        'wav': 'audio/wav',
        'txt': 'text/plain',
        'json': 'application/json',
        'xml': 'application/xml',
        'csv': 'text/csv'
      };
      
      // Prefer fileType from API response (most reliable)
      if (fileType && mimeTypes[fileType.toLowerCase()]) {
        contentType = mimeTypes[fileType.toLowerCase()];
      }
      // Handle .data files - determine actual file type from filename if fileType not provided
      else if (fileName.endsWith('.data') && !contentType) {
        // Extract extension from hash-prefixed filename (e.g., "520bf2ea-asset_health_6_png.data" -> "png")
        const nameWithoutData = fileName.replace(/\.data$/, '');
        // Remove hash prefix if present (e.g., "520bf2ea-asset_health_6_png" -> "asset_health_6_png")
        const nameWithoutHash = nameWithoutData.includes('-') ? nameWithoutData.split('-').slice(1).join('-') : nameWithoutData;
        const extension = nameWithoutHash.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase();
        
        if (extension && mimeTypes[extension]) {
          contentType = mimeTypes[extension];
        } else {
          // Default to image/jpeg if we can't determine
          contentType = 'image/jpeg';
        }
      }
      
      const blob = await response.blob();
      
      // If we determined a content type and blob doesn't have it, create a new blob with correct type
      if (contentType && blob.type !== contentType) {
        const correctedBlob = new Blob([blob], { type: contentType });
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
          const reader = new FileReader();
          reader.onloadend = () => resolve(reader.result);
          reader.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Failed to convert blob to data URL'));
          reader.readAsDataURL(correctedBlob);
        });
      }
      
      return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        const reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onloadend = () => resolve(reader.result);
        reader.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Failed to convert blob to data URL'));
        reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
      });
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn(`Error fetching file ${filePath}:`, err);
      return null;
    }
  }

  // Function to load only icons for an agent (called on initial load)
  async function loadMinioIconsForAgent(agent) {
    const iconsPath = agent.icons_path;
    
    if (!iconsPath) return;
    
    // Load icons (use first icon as agent icon)
    const iconFiles = await fetchFileList(iconsPath);
    for (const file of iconFiles) {
      // Check if it's an image file (file_type from API response)
      const fileType = (file.file_type || '').toLowerCase();
      if (fileType === 'png' || fileType === 'jpg' || fileType === 'jpeg' || fileType === 'gif' || fileType === 'webp') {
        // Use data_path from API response to fetch the file
        // Pass file_type from API response for accurate content type detection
        const dataUrl = await fetchFileAsDataUrl(file.data_path, fileType);
        if (dataUrl) {
          agent.icons.push({
            url: dataUrl,
            path: file.data_path,
            name: file.name // Use name from API response (display name without .data)
          });
        }
      }
    }
    // Use first icon as the main agent icon
    if (agent.icons.length > 0) {
      agent.iconUrl = agent.icons[0].url;
      // Update card icon immediately if card is already rendered
      updateCardIcon(agent);
    }
  }

  // Function to load only documents for an agent (called when card is opened)
  async function loadMinioDocsForAgent(agent) {
    // Check if already loaded
    if (agent._docsLoaded) {
      return;
    }
    
    const docsPath = agent.docs_path;
    if (!docsPath) {
      agent._docsLoaded = true;
      return;
    }

    // Load documents
    const docFiles = await fetchFileList(docsPath);
    for (const file of docFiles) {
      // Use data_path from API response (no leading slash needed)
      const fileUrl = `/api/v2/object_storage/file?path=${encodeURIComponent(file.data_path)}`;
      const fileExt = (file.file_type || '').toLowerCase() || 'file';
      
      agent.documents.push({
        url: fileUrl,
        path: file.data_path,
        name: file.name, // Use name from API response (display name)
        type: fileExt,
        size: file.file_size,
        contentType: file.content_type || `application/${fileExt}`
      });
    }
    
    // Mark as loaded
    agent._docsLoaded = true;
    
    // Update tabs if no docs found (tabs will be hidden)
    if (agent.documents.length === 0 && window.updateTabsAfterLoad) {
      window.updateTabsAfterLoad(agent);
    }
  }

  // Function to load a single image and update the DOM
  async function loadSingleImage(agent, file, index) {
    try {
      // Check if data_path exists
      if (!file.data_path) {
        console.error(`❌ File object missing data_path at index ${index} for agent ${agent.id}:`, file);
        return;
      }
      
      // Use data_path from API response to fetch the file
      // Pass file_type from API response for accurate content type detection
      const fileType = (file.file_type || '').toLowerCase();
      const dataUrl = await fetchFileAsDataUrl(file.data_path, fileType);
      if (dataUrl) {
        const imageData = {
          url: dataUrl,
          path: file.data_path,
          name: file.name, // Use name from API response (display name)
          imageName: agent.name || 'Agent Image',
          alt: agent.name || 'Agent Image',
          size: file.file_size,
          contentType: file.content_type || `image/${fileType || 'jpeg'}`
        };
        
        // Add to agent's images array
        agent.images[index] = imageData;
        
        // Update the DOM immediately for this specific image
        let imgElement = document.getElementById(`img-${agent.id}-${index}`);
        const spinnerElement = document.getElementById(`spinner-${agent.id}-${index}`);
        const galleryItem = spinnerElement ? spinnerElement.closest('.gallery-item') : null;
        
        // Hide spinner
        if (spinnerElement) {
          spinnerElement.style.display = 'none';
          spinnerElement.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
        }
        
        // Create img element if it doesn't exist
        if (!imgElement && galleryItem) {
          imgElement = document.createElement('img');
          imgElement.id = `img-${agent.id}-${index}`;
          imgElement.alt = imageData.name;
          galleryItem.appendChild(imgElement);
        }
        
        if (imgElement) {
          // Update image source with smooth transition
          imgElement.src = dataUrl;
          imgElement.alt = imageData.name;
          
          // Ensure proper styling for loaded image
          imgElement.style.width = '100%';
          imgElement.style.height = '100%';
          imgElement.style.objectFit = 'cover';
          imgElement.style.borderRadius = '8px';
          imgElement.style.cursor = 'pointer';
          imgElement.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';
          
          // Set up click handler for modal (use imageData.name instead of undefined fileName)
          imgElement.onclick = function(e) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            openImageModal(dataUrl, imageData.name);
          };
          
          // Also set onclick attribute for compatibility
          imgElement.setAttribute('onclick', `openImageModal('${dataUrl.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}', '${imageData.name.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}')`);
          
          // Show image and fade in
          imgElement.style.display = 'block';
          imgElement.style.opacity = '0';
          setTimeout(() => {
            imgElement.style.transition = 'opacity 0.3s ease';
            imgElement.style.opacity = '1';
            // Re-attach onclick handler after transition to ensure it persists
            imgElement.onclick = function(e) {
              e.stopPropagation();
              openImageModal(dataUrl, imageData.name);
            };
            imgElement.setAttribute('onclick', `openImageModal('${dataUrl.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}', '${imageData.name.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}')`);
          }, 10);
        }
        
        return imageData;
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn(`Failed to load image ${file.name}:`, err);
      // Keep placeholder but mark as failed
      const imgElement = document.getElementById(`img-${agent.id}-${index}`);
      if (imgElement) {
        imgElement.style.opacity = '0.5';
        imgElement.title = 'Failed to load image';
      }
    }
    return null;
  }

  async function loadImagesForPageRange(agent, startIdx, endIdx) {
    const imageFiles = agent._imageFiles || [];
    if (imageFiles.length === 0) return;
    
    // Initialize images array if needed
    if (!agent.images || agent.images.length !== imageFiles.length) {
      agent.images = new Array(imageFiles.length);
    }
    
    // Track which images are being loaded for this page
    const pageFiles = imageFiles.slice(startIdx, endIdx);
    const loadPromises = pageFiles.map((file, idx) => {
      const globalIdx = startIdx + idx;
      // Only load if not already loaded
      if (!agent.images[globalIdx] || !agent.images[globalIdx].url) {
        return loadSingleImage(agent, file, globalIdx);
      }
      return Promise.resolve();
    });
    
    await Promise.all(loadPromises);
    console.log(`✅ Loaded images ${startIdx} to ${endIdx - 1} for agent ${agent.id}`);
  }

  // Function to load images progressively (called when Images tab is clicked)
  // Now only loads the first page (6 images) initially
  async function loadMinioImagesForAgent(agent) {
    // Check if already initialized
    if (agent._imagesInitialized) {
      return;
    }
    
    const imagesPath = agent.images_path;
    if (!imagesPath) {
      agent._imagesInitialized = true;
      return;
    }

    if (agent._imagesLoading) {
      return;
    }

    agent._imagesLoading = true;
    
    try {
      // Step 1: Get file list quickly (just metadata)
      const imageFiles = await getImageFileList(agent);
      
      if (imageFiles.length === 0) {
        agent._imagesInitialized = true;
        agent._imagesLoading = false;
        // Update tabs to hide images tab since there are no images
        if (window.updateTabsAfterLoad) {
          window.updateTabsAfterLoad(agent);
        }
        return;
      }
      
      // Step 2: Store image file list metadata for pagination
      agent._imageFiles = imageFiles; // Store metadata for pagination
      
      // Step 3: Initialize images array
      if (!agent.images || agent.images.length !== imageFiles.length) {
        agent.images = new Array(imageFiles.length);
      }
      
      // Step 4: Load ONLY the first 6 images (first page)
      const imagesPerPage = 6;
      await loadImagesForPageRange(agent, 0, Math.min(imagesPerPage, imageFiles.length));
      
      // Mark as initialized (but not fully loaded - more pages will load on demand)
      agent._imagesInitialized = true;
      
    } catch (err) {
      console.error(`Failed to load images for agent ${agent.name}:`, err);
    } finally {
      agent._imagesLoading = false;
    }
  }

  // Function to load videos for an agent (if needed in future)
  async function loadMinioVideosForAgent(agent) {
    if (agent._videosLoaded) {
      return;
    }
    
    const videosPath = agent.videos_path;
    if (!videosPath) {
      agent._videosLoaded = true;
      return;
    }

    const videoFiles = await fetchFileList(videosPath);
    for (const file of videoFiles) {
      // Check if it's a video file (file_type from API response)
      const fileType = (file.file_type || '').toLowerCase();
      if (fileType === 'mp4' || fileType === 'webm' || fileType === 'mov' || fileType === 'avi') {
        // Use data_path from API response (no leading slash needed)
        const fileUrl = `/api/v2/object_storage/file?path=${encodeURIComponent(file.data_path)}`;
        
        agent.videos.push({
          url: fileUrl,
          path: file.data_path,
          title: file.name, // Use name from API response (display name)
          contentType: file.content_type || `video/${fileType}`,
          size: file.file_size
        });
      }
    }
    
    agent._videosLoaded = true;
    
    // Update tabs if no videos found (tabs will be hidden)
    if (agent.videos.length === 0 && window.updateTabsAfterLoad) {
      window.updateTabsAfterLoad(agent);
    }
  }

  // Function to get RDA object contents - tries multiple approaches
  async function getRDAObjectImage(folder, name) {
    // Silently try to load via service API (only method that might work)
    // If it fails, we'll just keep using the placeholder (no errors logged)
    try {
      const serviceEndpoint = `/api/v2/service/invoke`;
      const requestPayload = {
        "service-name": "saas-reports",
        "request": {
          "request-type": "get_rda_object_contents",
          "params": {
            "folder": folder,
            "name": name
          }
        }
      };
      
      const response = await fetch(serviceEndpoint, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Accept': '*/*'
        },
        body: JSON.stringify(requestPayload)
      });
      
      if (response.ok) {
        const blob = await response.blob();
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
          const reader = new FileReader();
          reader.onloadend = () => {
            console.log(`✅ [getRDAObjectImage] Loaded via service API`);
            resolve(reader.result);
          };
          reader.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Failed to convert blob'));
          reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
        });
      }
    } catch (err) {
      // Silently fail - placeholder will be used instead
      // No console logs to avoid cluttering
    }
    
    // Return null to indicate we should keep using placeholder
    return null;
  }

  // Adopt light/dark mode from top-level app automatically
  (function setupParentThemeSync(){
    const htmlEl = document.documentElement;
    const applyTheme = (mode) => {
      const t = mode === 'light' ? 'light' : 'dark';
      htmlEl.setAttribute('data-theme', t);
    };

    function tryParentDomTheme(){
      try{
        if(window.top && window.top !== window && window.top.document){
          const t = window.top.document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme');
          if(t === 'light' || t === 'dark'){
            applyTheme(t);
            return true;
          }
        }
      }catch(e){ /* cross-origin */ }
      return false;
    }

    window.addEventListener('message', (ev) => {
      const d = ev && ev.data;
      if(!d) return;
      const t = (d.theme || (d.payload && d.payload.theme) || '').toLowerCase();
      if(d.type === 'THEME_CHANGE' || d.type === 'SET_THEME'){
        if(t === 'light' || t === 'dark') applyTheme(t);
      }
    });

    if(!tryParentDomTheme()){
      // Request theme from parent if embedded
      try{ if(window.top && window.top !== window){ window.top.postMessage({ type:'REQUEST_THEME', from:'agent_catalogue' }, '*'); } }catch(e){}
      // Fallback to system preference
      const mq = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)');
      if(mq){
        applyTheme(mq.matches ? 'dark' : 'light');
        if(mq.addEventListener){
          mq.addEventListener('change', (ev) => applyTheme(ev.matches ? 'dark' : 'light'));
        }
      }
    }
  })();

  function updateTabNavigation(){
    const container = document.querySelector('.tabs-nav-container');
    if(!container) return;
    
    const scroll = container.querySelector('.tabs-scroll');
    const leftBtn = container.querySelector('.tab-nav-btn.left');
    const rightBtn = container.querySelector('.tab-nav-btn.right');
    
    if(!scroll || !leftBtn || !rightBtn) return;
    
    const maxScroll = scroll.scrollWidth - scroll.parentElement.clientWidth;
    
    leftBtn.classList.toggle('hidden', tabScrollPosition <= 0);
    rightBtn.classList.toggle('hidden', tabScrollPosition >= maxScroll);
  }

  function scrollTabs(direction){
    const container = document.querySelector('.tabs-nav-container');
    if(!container) return;
    
    const scroll = container.querySelector('.tabs-scroll');
    if(!scroll) return;
    
    const scrollAmount = 200;
    const maxScroll = scroll.scrollWidth - scroll.parentElement.clientWidth;
    
    if(direction === 'left'){
      tabScrollPosition = Math.max(0, tabScrollPosition - scrollAmount);
    } else {
      tabScrollPosition = Math.min(maxScroll, tabScrollPosition + scrollAmount);
    }
    
    scroll.style.transform = `translateX(-${tabScrollPosition}px)`;
    updateTabNavigation();
  }

  // Helper function to get personas from agent (arrays from stream)
  // IMPORTANT: Preserves spaces in persona names (never trim)
  function getAgentPersonas(agent) {
    const personas = [];
    
    // Helper to ensure we have an array
    // IMPORTANT: Do NOT trim persona names - preserve spaces before/after
    const ensureArray = (value) => {
      if (!value) return [];
      if (Array.isArray(value)) {
        // Ensure all items are strings - DO NOT TRIM (preserve spaces)
        return value.map(v => String(v)).filter(v => v && v.length > 0);
      }
      if (typeof value === 'string') {
        const str = value;
        // Try to parse as JSON array first (format: '["Service Desk", "DataOps"]')
        if (str.trim().startsWith('[') && str.trim().endsWith(']')) {
          try {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(str);
            if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {
              // DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces in persona names
              return parsed.map(v => String(v)).filter(v => v && v.length > 0);
            }
          } catch (e) {
            console.warn('Failed to parse personas JSON:', e, str);
            // If JSON parse fails, try to extract values manually
            try {
              // Try to extract values from string like ["a", "b", "c"]
              const matches = str.match(/"([^"]+)"/g);
              if (matches) {
                // DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces
                return matches.map(m => m.replace(/"/g, '')).filter(m => m && m.length > 0);
              }
            } catch (e2) {
              console.warn('Failed to extract personas from string:', e2);
            }
          }
        }
        // If it's a comma-separated string (but NOT a JSON array), split it
        if (!str.trim().startsWith('[') && str.includes(',')) {
          // Only remove surrounding quotes, DO NOT TRIM spaces
          return str.split(',').map(p => p.replace(/^["']|["']$/g, '')).filter(p => p && p.length > 0);
        }
        // Single string value - preserve as-is (no trim)
        return str.length > 0 ? [str] : [];
      }
      return [];
    };
    
    // Check for array fields from stream (parse if needed)
    const parsedPersonas = ensureArray(agent.personas);
    const parsedAiPersonas = ensureArray(agent.ai_personas);
    
    if (parsedPersonas.length > 0) {
      personas.push(...parsedPersonas);
    }
    if (parsedAiPersonas.length > 0) {
      personas.push(...parsedAiPersonas);
    }
    
    // Fallback to single value for backward compatibility
    // Handle case where ai_persona/persona might be a JSON array string like '["DataOps"]'
    const addPersonaFallback = (value) => {
      if (!value) return;
      let val = value;
      // If it's a JSON array string, parse it
      if (typeof val === 'string' && val.trim().startsWith('[') && val.trim().endsWith(']')) {
        try {
          const parsed = JSON.parse(val);
          if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {
            parsed.forEach(p => {
              const pStr = String(p);
              if (pStr && pStr.length > 0 && !personas.includes(pStr)) {
                personas.push(pStr);
              }
            });
            return;
          }
        } catch (e) {
          // Not valid JSON, use as-is
        }
      }
      // If it's an array
      if (Array.isArray(val)) {
        val.forEach(p => {
          const pStr = String(p);
          if (pStr && pStr.length > 0 && !personas.includes(pStr)) {
            personas.push(pStr);
          }
        });
        return;
      }
      // Single string value
      const valStr = String(val);
      if (valStr && valStr.length > 0 && !personas.includes(valStr)) {
        personas.push(valStr);
      }
    };
    
    addPersonaFallback(agent.ai_persona);
    addPersonaFallback(agent.persona);
    
    // Return unique personas (deduplicate and filter out empty values)
    // DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces in persona names
    const uniquePersonas = [...new Set(personas.map(p => String(p)).filter(p => p && p.length > 0))];
    console.log('🔍 getAgentPersonas - Input:', { personas: agent.personas, ai_personas: agent.ai_personas });
    console.log('🔍 getAgentPersonas - Output:', uniquePersonas);
    return uniquePersonas;
  }

  // Helper function to get workflows from agent (arrays from stream)
  // IMPORTANT: Preserves spaces in workflow names (never trim)
  function getAgentWorkflows(agent) {
    console.log('🔍 getAgentWorkflows - Agent object:', {
      workflows: agent.workflows,
      ai_workflows: agent.ai_workflows,
      workflow_name: agent.workflow_name,
      ai_workflow_name: agent.ai_workflow_name,
      allKeys: Object.keys(agent).filter(k => k.toLowerCase().includes('workflow'))
    });
    
    const workflows = [];
    
    // Helper to ensure we have an array (similar to personas)
    // IMPORTANT: DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces in workflow names
    const ensureArray = (value) => {
      if (!value) return [];
      if (Array.isArray(value)) {
        // First, convert all items to strings
        let result = value.map(v => String(v)).filter(v => v && v.length > 0);
        
        // Special case: if array has a single element that looks like a JSON array, parse it
        if (result.length === 1 && result[0].trim().startsWith('[') && result[0].trim().endsWith(']')) {
          try {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(result[0]);
            if (Array.isArray(parsed) && parsed.length > 0) {
              // DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces
              result = parsed.map(v => String(v)).filter(v => v && v.length > 0);
              console.log('✅ Parsed single JSON array element into multiple workflows:', result);
            }
          } catch (e) {
            // Try regex extraction
            const matches = result[0].match(/"([^"]+)"/g);
            if (matches && matches.length > 0) {
              result = matches.map(m => m.replace(/"/g, '')).filter(m => m && m.length > 0);
              console.log('✅ Extracted workflows from single array element using regex:', result);
            }
          }
        }
        
        return result;
      }
      if (typeof value === 'string') {
        const str = value;
        // Try to parse as JSON array first (format: '["workflow1", "workflow2"]')
        if (str.trim().startsWith('[') && str.trim().endsWith(']')) {
          try {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(str);
            if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {
              // DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces
              return parsed.map(v => String(v)).filter(v => v && v.length > 0);
            }
          } catch (e) {
            console.warn('Failed to parse workflows JSON:', e, str);
            // If JSON parse fails, try to extract values manually
            try {
              // Try to extract values from string like ["a", "b", "c"]
              const matches = str.match(/"([^"]+)"/g);
              if (matches) {
                // DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces
                return matches.map(m => m.replace(/"/g, '')).filter(m => m && m.length > 0);
              }
            } catch (e2) {
              console.warn('Failed to extract workflows from string:', e2);
            }
          }
        }
        // If it's a comma-separated string (but NOT a JSON array), split it
        if (!str.trim().startsWith('[') && str.includes(',')) {
          // DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces
          return str.split(',').map(p => p.replace(/^["']|["']$/g, '')).filter(p => p && p.length > 0);
        }
        // Single string value - preserve as-is (no trim)
        return str.length > 0 ? [str] : [];
      }
      return [];
    };
    
    // Check for array fields from stream (parse if needed)
    // Check multiple possible field names
    const workflowFields = [
      agent.workflows,
      agent.ai_workflows,
      agent.workflow,
      agent.ai_workflow,
      agent.workflow_list,
      agent.ai_workflow_list
    ];
    
    for (const fieldValue of workflowFields) {
      if (fieldValue) {
        const parsed = ensureArray(fieldValue);
        if (parsed.length > 0) {
          workflows.push(...parsed);
          console.log('✅ Found workflows in field:', fieldValue, 'parsed:', parsed);
        }
      }
    }
    
    // Fallback to single value for backward compatibility
    const singleWorkflowFields = [
      agent.ai_workflow_name,
      agent.workflow_name,
      agent.workflowName,
      agent.ai_workflowName
    ];
    
    for (const fieldValue of singleWorkflowFields) {
      // DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces
      const workflowStr = String(fieldValue);
      if (fieldValue && workflowStr && workflowStr.length > 0 && !workflows.some(w => String(w) === workflowStr)) {
        workflows.push(workflowStr);
        console.log('✅ Found single workflow:', fieldValue);
      }
    }
    
    // Deduplicate and convert to objects with name/persona
    // DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces in workflow names
    const uniqueWorkflows = [...new Set(workflows.map(w => String(w)).filter(w => w && w.length > 0))];
    const defaultPersona = agent.ai_persona || agent.persona || null;
    
    // Convert to array of objects
    const workflowObjects = uniqueWorkflows.map(w => {
      if (typeof w === 'object' && w.name) {
        return w; // Already an object
      }
      return { name: String(w), persona: defaultPersona };
    });
    
    console.log('🔍 getAgentWorkflows - Input:', { workflows: agent.workflows, ai_workflows: agent.ai_workflows });
    console.log('🔍 getAgentWorkflows - Output:', workflowObjects);
    return workflowObjects;
  }

    // Multiple personas - show selection modal

    // Define escape handler function (will be used later)

    const closeModal = () => {
      if (modal && modal.parentNode) {
        modal.remove();
      }
      delete window._pendingPersonaCallback;
      if (escapeHandler) {
        document.removeEventListener('keydown', escapeHandler);
      }
    };

      text.className = 'selection-item-text';
      const title = document.createElement('div');
      title.className = 'selection-item-title';
      // Display trimmed for visual purposes, but pass original to callback
      title.textContent = personaStr.trim() || personaStr;
      text.appendChild(title);
      
      item.appendChild(icon);
      item.appendChild(text);
      
      // Add click handler - pass original personaStr (with spaces preserved)
      item.addEventListener('click', () => {
        closeModal();
        // Pass original persona string with spaces preserved
        if (callback) callback(personaStr);
      });
      
      return item;

        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="selection-modal-backdrop"></div>
    `;
    
    // Append selection items
    const selectionList = modal.querySelector('.selection-list');
    if (!selectionList) {
      console.error('❌ selection-list element not found!');
      return;
    }
    
    if (selectionItems.length === 0) {
      console.error('❌ No selection items to display!');
      return;
    }
    
    selectionItems.forEach(item => {
      if (item) selectionList.appendChild(item);
    });
    
    // Define escape handler
    escapeHandler = (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        closeModal();
      }
    };
    
    // Close button handler
    const closeBtn = modal.querySelector('.selection-modal-close');
    const backdrop = modal.querySelector('.selection-modal-backdrop');
    
    if (closeBtn) {
      closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
    }
    if (backdrop) {
      backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
    }
    
    window._pendingPersonaCallback = callback;
    document.body.appendChild(modal);
    document.addEventListener('keydown', escapeHandler);
    console.log('✅ Modal added to DOM');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('❌ Error in showPersonaSelectionModal:', error);
      console.error('Error stack:', error.stack);
      alert('Error showing persona selection: ' + error.message);
      // Fallback: call callback with null to proceed without selection
      if (callback) callback(null);
    }
  }

      workflows = workflows.map(w => {

    const closeModal = () => {

      if (escapeHandler) {
        document.removeEventListener('keydown', escapeHandler);

    };
    
    // Create selection items with proper event handlers
    // IMPORTANT: DO NOT TRIM - preserve spaces in workflow/persona names
    const selectionItems = workflows.map((workflow, idx) => {

      // Display trimmed for visual purposes, but pass original to callback

      text.appendChild(title);
      
      item.appendChild(icon);
      item.appendChild(text);
      
      // Add click handler - pass original strings with spaces preserved
      item.addEventListener('click', () => {
        closeModal();
        // Pass original workflow and persona strings with spaces preserved
        if (callback) callback(workflowNameStr, personaStr);
      });
      
      return item;
    }).filter(item => item !== null); // Filter out null items
    
    modal.innerHTML = `
      <div class="selection-modal-content">

          <div class="selection-list"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="selection-modal-backdrop"></div>
    `;
    
    // Append selection items
    const selectionList = modal.querySelector('.selection-list');
    if (!selectionList) {
      console.error('❌ selection-list element not found!');
      return;
    }
    
    if (selectionItems.length === 0) {
      console.error('❌ No selection items to display!');
      return;
    }
    
    selectionItems.forEach(item => {
      if (item) selectionList.appendChild(item);
    });
    
    // Define escape handler
    escapeHandler = (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        closeModal();
      }
    };
    
    // Close button handler
    const closeBtn = modal.querySelector('.selection-modal-close');
    const backdrop = modal.querySelector('.selection-modal-backdrop');
    
    if (closeBtn) {
      closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
    }
    if (backdrop) {
      backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
    }
    
    window._pendingWorkflowCallback = callback;
    document.body.appendChild(modal);
    document.addEventListener('keydown', escapeHandler);
    console.log('✅ Workflow modal added to DOM');
    console.log('✅ Workflow modal added to DOM');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('❌ Error in showWorkflowSelectionModal:', error);
      console.error('Error stack:', error.stack);
      alert('Error showing workflow selection: ' + error.message);

      if (callback) callback(null, null);

  // Helper function to format file size
  function formatFileSize(bytes) {
    if (!bytes || bytes === 0) return '';
    const k = 1024;
    const sizes = ['Bytes', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
    const i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));
    return Math.round(bytes / Math.pow(k, i) * 100) / 100 + ' ' + sizes[i];
  }

    function renderDocs() {

      const currentHasDocsPath = agent.docs_path && agent.docs_path.trim() !== '' && !agent._docsLoaded;
      
      // Don't render if no docs and either no path OR path was checked and found empty
      if(!currentHasDocs && (!hasDocsPath || (agent._docsLoaded && !currentHasDocs))) return '';
      
      // If no docs loaded yet but path exists and not initialized, show loading state
      if(!currentHasDocs && currentHasDocsPath && !agent._docsLoaded) {
        // Docs not loaded yet - show loading state with placeholders
        return `
          <div class="tab-content ${initialTab === 'documents' ? 'active' : ''}" data-tab="documents">
            <div class="tab-section">

    // Function to change image page
    window.changeImagePage = async function(agentId, page) {
      const agent = agents.find(a => a.id === agentId);
      if (!agent) {
        console.error('Agent not found:', agentId);
        return;
      }
      
      // Use image file list if available, otherwise use loaded images
      const imageFiles = agent._imageFiles || [];
      const imagesToRender = agent.images || [];
      const totalImageCount = imageFiles.length > 0 ? imageFiles.length : imagesToRender.length;
      
      if (totalImageCount === 0) {
        console.warn('No images found for agent:', agentId);
        return;
      }
      
      const imagesPerPage = 6;
      const totalPages = Math.ceil(totalImageCount / imagesPerPage);
      if (page < 1 || page > totalPages) {
        console.warn('Invalid page number:', page, 'out of', totalPages);
        return;
      }
      
      // Update page number FIRST
      agent._imagePage = page;
      
      // Get the images tab content container
      const imagesTabContent = $(`.tab-content[data-tab="images"]`);
      if (!imagesTabContent) {
        console.error('Images tab content not found');
        return;
      }
      
      // Calculate the range for this page
      const startIdx = (page - 1) * imagesPerPage;
      const endIdx = Math.min(startIdx + imagesPerPage, totalImageCount);
      
      // Load images for this page if not already loaded
      if (imageFiles.length > 0) {
        // Check if images for this page are already loaded
        const needsLoading = imageFiles.slice(startIdx, endIdx).some((file, idx) => {
          const globalIdx = startIdx + idx;
          return !agent.images || !agent.images[globalIdx] || !agent.images[globalIdx].url;
        });
        
        if (needsLoading) {
          console.log(`📥 Loading images for page ${page} (indices ${startIdx} to ${endIdx - 1})`);
          // Load images for this page
          await loadImagesForPageRange(agent, startIdx, endIdx);
        }
      }
      
      // Immediately render the new page
      try {
        await renderImagesWithPagination(agent, imagesTabContent);
        console.log('✅ Page changed to', page, 'for agent', agentId);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error rendering images page:', error);
      }
    };
