      if(!hasContact) return '';
      const iconEmail = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>';
      const iconPhone = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 0 1-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 0 1-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 0 1 4.11 2h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 1.72 12.84 12.84 0 0 0 .7 2.81 2 2 0 0 1-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 0 0 6 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 0 1 2.11-.45 12.84 12.84 0 0 0 2.81.7A2 2 0 0 1 22 16.92z"/></svg>';
      const iconWeb = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg>';
      const iconChat = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M21 11.5a8.38 8.38 0 0 1-.9 3.8 8.5 8.5 0 0 1-7.6 4.7 8.38 8.38 0 0 1-3.8-.9L3 21l1.9-5.7a8.38 8.38 0 0 1-.9-3.8 8.5 8.5 0 0 1 4.7-7.6 8.38 8.38 0 0 1 3.8-.9h.5a8.48 8.48 0 0 1 8 8v.5z"/></svg>';
      const itemsHtml = contactItems.map(ci => {
        if(ci.type === 'email'){
          return `<a class="contact-item" href="mailto:${ci.value}"><div class="contact-icon">${iconEmail}</div><div class="contact-details"><div class="contact-label">${ci.label}</div><div class="contact-value">${ci.value}</div></div></a>`;
        }
        if(ci.type === 'phone'){
          return `<a class="contact-item" href="tel:${ci.value}"><div class="contact-icon">${iconPhone}</div><div class="contact-details"><div class="contact-label">${ci.label}</div><div class="contact-value">${ci.value}</div></div></a>`;
        }
        if(ci.type === 'website'){
          const site = ci.value;
          const href = site && site.startsWith('http') ? site : `https://${site}`;
          return `<a class="contact-item" href="${href}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><div class="contact-icon">${iconWeb}</div><div class="contact-details"><div class="contact-label">${ci.label}</div><div class="contact-value">${site}</div></div></a>`;
        }
        return `<div class="contact-item"><div class="contact-icon">${iconChat}</div><div class="contact-details"><div class="contact-label">${ci.label}</div><div class="contact-value">${ci.value}</div></div></div>`;
      }).join('');
      return `<div class="tab-content ${initialTab==='contact'?'active':''}" data-tab="contact"><div class="tab-section"><div class="tab-section-title">Support & Contact Information</div><div class="contact-grid">${itemsHtml}</div></div></div>`;
    }

    function renderRelated(){
      if(!hasRelated) return '';
      const items = agent.related.map(r => {
        const relName = r.name || '';
        const relDesc = r.description || r.decription || '';
        return `<div class="document-item" onclick="openAgentByName('${relName.replace(/'/g, "'")}')"><div class="document-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/></svg></div><div class="document-info"><div class="document-name">${relName}</div><div class="document-meta">${relDesc}</div></div></div>`;
      }).join('');
      return `<div class="tab-content ${initialTab==='related'?'active':''}" data-tab="related"><div class="tab-section"><div class="tab-section-title">Related Agents</div><div class="document-list">${items}</div></div></div>`;
    }

    const tabsNavHtml = renderTabsNav();
    const docsHtml = renderDocs();
    const imagesHtml = renderImages();
    const videosHtml = renderVideos();
    const contactHtml = renderContact();
    const relatedHtml = renderRelated();

    // Get the current tabs-wrapper
    const tabsWrapper = $('#paneContent').querySelector('.tabs-wrapper');
    if (tabsWrapper) {
      // Update existing tabs-wrapper
      tabsWrapper.innerHTML = `${tabsNavHtml}${docsHtml}${imagesHtml}${videosHtml}${contactHtml}${relatedHtml}`;
    } else {
      // Create new tabs-wrapper if it doesn't exist
      const actionButtons = $('#paneContent').querySelector('.action-buttons');
      if (actionButtons) {
        actionButtons.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', `<div class="tabs-wrapper">${tabsNavHtml}${docsHtml}${imagesHtml}${videosHtml}${contactHtml}${relatedHtml}</div>`);
      } else {
        // Fallback: append to paneContent
        $('#paneContent').insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', `<div class="tabs-wrapper">${tabsNavHtml}${docsHtml}${imagesHtml}${videosHtml}${contactHtml}${relatedHtml}</div>`);
      }
    }
    
    // Update tab navigation
    setTimeout(updateTabNavigation, 100);
  }

  // Function to update pane content when media loads
  function updatePaneContent(agent) {
    // Check if pane is still open for this agent
    if (!$('#sidePane').classList.contains('open')) return;
    if ($('#paneTitle').textContent !== agent.name) return;

    // Re-evaluate tabs based on loaded media - only show tabs if content exists OR if actively loading
    const hasDocs = Array.isArray(agent.documents) && agent.documents.length > 0;
    const hasDocsPath = agent.docs_path && agent.docs_path.trim() !== '' && !agent._docsLoaded;
    const hasImages = Array.isArray(agent.images) && agent.images.length > 0;
    const hasImagesPath = agent.images_path && agent.images_path.trim() !== '' && !agent._imagesInitialized;
    const hasVideos = Array.isArray(agent.videos) && agent.videos.length > 0;
    const hasVideosPath = agent.videos_path && agent.videos_path.trim() !== '' && !agent._videosLoaded;
    const contactItems = (() => {
      const items = [];
      if(Array.isArray(agent.contact)){
        agent.contact.forEach(c => {
          if(c.email) items.push({ type:'email', value:c.email, label:c.name || 'Email' });
          if(c.phone) items.push({ type:'phone', value:c.phone, label:c.name || 'Phone' });
          if(c.website) items.push({ type:'website', value:c.website, label:c.name || 'Website' });
          if(c.chat) items.push({ type:'chat', value:c.chat, label:c.name || 'Live Chat' });
        });
      } else if(agent.contact && typeof agent.contact === 'object'){
        const c = agent.contact;
        if(c.email) items.push({ type:'email', value:c.email, label:'Email' });
        if(c.phone) items.push({ type:'phone', value:c.phone, label:'Phone' });
        if(c.website) items.push({ type:'website', value:c.website, label:'Website' });
        if(c.chat) items.push({ type:'chat', value:c.chat, label:'Live Chat' });
      }
      return items;
    })();
    const hasContact = contactItems.length > 0;
    const hasRelated = Array.isArray(agent.related) && agent.related.length > 0;

    // Only add tabs if content exists or is loading
    const tabs = [];
    const shouldShowDocsTab = hasDocs || hasDocsPath;
    const shouldShowImagesTab = hasImages || hasImagesPath;
    const shouldShowVideosTab = hasVideos || hasVideosPath;
    if(shouldShowDocsTab) tabs.push('documents');
    if(shouldShowImagesTab) tabs.push('images');
    if(shouldShowVideosTab) tabs.push('videos');
    if(hasContact) tabs.push('contact');
    if(hasRelated) tabs.push('related');

    // Preserve the current active tab instead of resetting to first tab
    const currentActiveTab = activeTab && tabs.includes(activeTab) ? activeTab : (tabs[0] || null);
    activeTab = currentActiveTab || activeTab;

    // Update specific tab content without re-rendering everything (prevents tab switching)
    if ((hasDocs || hasDocsPath) && activeTab === 'documents') {
      // Update documents tab when docs finish loading
      const docsTabContent = $(`.tab-content[data-tab="documents"]`);
      if (docsTabContent) {
        const items = agent.documents.map(doc => {
          const isExternal = doc.url && doc.url.startsWith('http');
          const fileType = (doc.type || '').toLowerCase();
          const fileSize = doc.size ? formatFileSize(doc.size) : '';
          if (isExternal) {
            return `
              <a class="document-item" href="${doc.url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
                <div class="document-icon">
                  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                    <path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/>
                    <polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/>
                  </svg>
                </div>
                <div class="document-info">
                  <div class="document-name">${doc.name || 'Document'}</div>
                  <div class="document-meta">${[fileType, fileSize].filter(Boolean).join(' • ')}</div>
                </div>
              </a>`;
          }
          return `
            <div class="document-item" style="cursor:pointer"
                 onclick="openDocModal('${doc.url || ''}', '${(doc.name || 'Document').replace(/'/g, "\\'")}', '${fileType}')">
              <div class="document-icon">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                  <path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/>
                  <polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/>
                </svg>
              </div>
              <div class="document-info">
                <div class="document-name">${doc.name || 'Document'}</div>
                <div class="document-meta">${[fileType, fileSize].filter(Boolean).join(' • ') || 'File'}</div>
              </div>
            </div>`;
        }).join('');
        docsTabContent.innerHTML = `
          <div class="tab-section">
            <div class="tab-section-title">Product Documents</div>
            <div class="document-list">${items}</div>
          </div>`;
      }
    } else if ((hasImages || hasImagesPath) && activeTab === 'images') {
      // Only update the images tab content with pagination, keep other tabs as-is
      const imagesTabContent = $(`.tab-content[data-tab="images"]`);
      if (imagesTabContent) {
        renderImagesWithPagination(agent, imagesTabContent).catch(err => {
          console.error('Error rendering images:', err);
        });
      }
    } else if ((hasVideos || hasVideosPath) && activeTab === 'videos') {
      // Update videos tab when videos finish loading
      const videosTabContent = $(`.tab-content[data-tab="videos"]`);
      if (videosTabContent) {
        // If videos are loaded but empty, show "No videos found"
        if (agent._videosLoaded && (!agent.videos || agent.videos.length === 0)) {
          videosTabContent.innerHTML = `
            <div class="tab-section">
              <div class="tab-section-title">Tutorial Videos</div>
              <div class="video-list" style="text-align:center;padding:40px;color:var(--text-muted);">No videos found</div>
            </div>`;
          return;
        }
        
        // If videos exist, render them
        if (hasVideos && agent.videos.length > 0) {
          const items = agent.videos.map(v => {
          const isExternal = v.url && v.url.startsWith('http');
          const thumbHTML = v.thumb
            ? `<img src="${v.thumb}" alt="${v.title || 'Video'}" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:8px"/>`
            : `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"/></svg>`;
          if (isExternal) {
          return `
              <a class="video-item" href="${v.url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
                <div class="video-thumb">${thumbHTML}</div>
                <div class="video-info">
                  <div class="video-title">${v.title || 'Video'}</div>
                  <div class="video-duration">${v.duration || ''}</div>
          </div>
              </a>`;
          }
          return `
            <div class="video-item" style="cursor:pointer"
                onclick="openVideoModal('${v.url}', '${v.title || 'Video'}')">
              <div class="video-thumb">${thumbHTML}</div>
              <div class="video-info">
                <div class="video-title">${v.title || 'Video'}</div>
                <div class="video-duration">${v.duration || ''}</div>
              </div>
            </div>`;
        }).join('');
          videosTabContent.innerHTML = `
          <div class="tab-section">
              <div class="tab-section-title">Tutorial Videos</div>
              <div class="video-list">${items}</div>
          </div>`;
        }
        // If videos_path exists but videos aren't loaded yet, show loading state
        else if (hasVideosPath && !agent._videosLoaded) {
          videosTabContent.innerHTML = `
            <div class="tab-section">
              <div class="tab-section-title">Tutorial Videos</div>
              <div class="video-list" style="text-align:center;padding:40px;color:var(--text-muted);">
                <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px;">
                  <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" style="animation:spin 1s linear infinite;">
                    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke-opacity="0.25"/>
                    <path d="M12 2 A10 10 0 0 1 22 12" stroke-linecap="round"/>
                  </svg>
                  <span>Loading videos...</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>`;
        }
      }
    } else {
      // Re-render all tabs if we're not on a specific tab (shouldn't happen often)
      renderPaneContent(agent, currentActiveTab, tabs, shouldShowDocsTab, shouldShowImagesTab, shouldShowVideosTab, hasContact, hasRelated, contactItems, hasImagesPath, hasDocsPath, hasVideosPath);
    }
  }

  function closePane(){
    $('#sidePane').classList.remove('open');
    $('.main-content').classList.remove('pane-open');
    $('#backdrop').classList.remove('active');
  }

  window.switchTabGlobal = switchTab;
  window.scrollTabsGlobal = scrollTabs;
  window.openAgentByName = (name)=>{
    if(!name) return;
    const a = agents.find(x => x.name && x.name.toLowerCase() === String(name).toLowerCase());
    if(a) openPane(a);
  };

  $('#closePane').addEventListener('click', closePane);
  // Note: backdrop click handler removed since backdrop no longer blocks pointer events
  // Users can close pane using the close button, or clicking outside will be handled by the pane itself


  function renderAll(){
    const isSearching = searchQuery.trim() !== '';
    
    if(isSearching){
      $('#sectionsContainer').classList.add('search-active');
      $('#searchResults').classList.add('active');
      $('#searchResultsGrid').innerHTML = '';
      
      // Filter by selected projects - if none selected, show no agents
      let base = agents;
      if (selectedProjects && selectedProjects.length > 0) {
        // Filter by selected projects
        base = agents.filter(a => selectedProjects.includes(a.ai_project_name));
        console.log(`🔍 Filtered by selected projects (${selectedProjects.length}):`, base.length, 'agents');
      } else {
        // No projects selected - show no agents
        base = [];
        console.log('🔍 No projects selected - showing no agents');
      }
      // Then filter by enabled state and Deployed status
      const beforeEnabled = base.length;
      base = base.filter(a => String(a.state || '').toLowerCase() === 'enabled');
      const beforeStatus = base.length;
      base = base.filter(a => String(a.status || '').toLowerCase() === 'deployed');
      console.log(`🔍 After enabled filter:`, beforeStatus, 'agents (from', beforeEnabled, ')');
      console.log(`🔍 After status filter (Deployed):`, base.length, 'agents (from', beforeStatus, ')');
      
      let filteredAgents = base.filter(agent => {
        const name = (agent.name || '').toLowerCase();
        const category = (agent.category || '').toLowerCase();
        const tagsText = Array.isArray(agent.tags) ? agent.tags.join(' ').toLowerCase() : '';
        const description = (agent.description || '').toLowerCase();
        return (
          name.includes(searchQuery) ||
          category.includes(searchQuery) ||
          tagsText.includes(searchQuery) ||
          description.includes(searchQuery)
        );
      });

      filteredAgents.sort((a, b) => {
        const nameA = a.name || '';
        const nameB = b.name || '';
        const categoryA = a.category || '';
        const categoryB = b.category || '';
        const versionA = a.version || '';
        const versionB = b.version || '';
        if(sortBy === 'name') return nameA.localeCompare(nameB);
        if(sortBy === 'category') return categoryA.localeCompare(categoryB);
        if(sortBy === 'recent') return new Date(b.lastRun || 0) - new Date(a.lastRun || 0);
        if(sortBy === 'version') return versionB.localeCompare(versionA);
        return 0;
      });

      if(filteredAgents.length === 0){
        $('#searchResultsGrid').innerHTML = '<div class="empty-section">No agents found matching your search.</div>';
        $('#searchCount').textContent = '0 agents found';
      } else {
        const categorizedResults = {};
        filteredAgents.forEach(agent => {
          // Normalize category name (case-insensitive)
          const normalizedCategory = (agent.category || '').toLowerCase();
          if(!categorizedResults[normalizedCategory]){
            categorizedResults[normalizedCategory] = [];
          }
          categorizedResults[normalizedCategory].push(agent);
        });
        
        // Convert normalized keys back to display names (use first agent's category)
        const displayCategoryMap = {};
        Object.keys(categorizedResults).forEach(normalized => {
          const firstAgent = categorizedResults[normalized][0];
          displayCategoryMap[firstAgent.category || normalized] = categorizedResults[normalized];
        });

        Object.entries(displayCategoryMap).forEach(([category, categoryAgents]) => {
          const groupDiv = document.createElement('div');
          groupDiv.className = 'search-category-group';
          
          const headerDiv = document.createElement('div');
          headerDiv.className = 'search-category-header';
          headerDiv.textContent = `${category} (${categoryAgents.length})`;
          groupDiv.appendChild(headerDiv);

          const tilesDiv = document.createElement('div');
          tilesDiv.className = 'search-category-tiles';
          categoryAgents.forEach(agent => {
            tilesDiv.appendChild(tile(agent));
          });
          groupDiv.appendChild(tilesDiv);

          $('#searchResultsGrid').appendChild(groupDiv);
        });

        $('#searchCount').textContent = `${filteredAgents.length} agent${filteredAgents.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} found in ${Object.keys(categorizedResults).length} categor${Object.keys(categorizedResults).length === 1 ? 'y' : 'ies'}`;
      }
      
      // Update project counts
      updateProjectCounts();
      
    } else {
      $('#sectionsContainer').classList.remove('search-active');
      $('#searchResults').classList.remove('active');
      
      // Clear dynamic categories and favorites
      $('#categoriesContainer').innerHTML = '';
      $('#favorites-grid').innerHTML = '';

      let sortedAgents = [...agents];
      sortedAgents.sort((a, b) => {
        const nameA = a.name || '';
        const nameB = b.name || '';
        const categoryA = a.category || '';
        const categoryB = b.category || '';
        const versionA = a.version || '';
        const versionB = b.version || '';
        if(sortBy === 'name') return nameA.localeCompare(nameB);
        if(sortBy === 'category') return categoryA.localeCompare(categoryB);
        if(sortBy === 'recent') return new Date(b.lastRun || 0) - new Date(a.lastRun || 0);
        if(sortBy === 'version') return versionB.localeCompare(versionA);
        return 0;
      });

      // Filter by selected projects - if none selected, show no agents
      let filteredByProject = sortedAgents;
      if (selectedProjects && selectedProjects.length > 0) {
        // Filter by selected projects
        filteredByProject = sortedAgents.filter(a => selectedProjects.includes(a.ai_project_name));
        console.log(`🔍 Main view - Filtered by selected projects (${selectedProjects.length}):`, filteredByProject.length, 'agents');
      } else {
        // No projects selected - show no agents
        filteredByProject = [];
        console.log('🔍 Main view - No projects selected - showing no agents');
      }
      // Then filter by enabled state and Deployed status (always show only enabled and deployed)
      const beforeEnabled = filteredByProject.length;
      const filteredByState = filteredByProject.filter(a => String(a.state || '').toLowerCase() === 'enabled');
      const beforeStatus = filteredByState.length;
      const filteredByStatus = filteredByState.filter(a => String(a.status || '').toLowerCase() === 'deployed');
      console.log(`🔍 Main view - After enabled filter:`, beforeStatus, 'agents (from', beforeEnabled, ')');
      console.log(`🔍 Main view - After status filter (Deployed):`, filteredByStatus.length, 'agents (from', beforeStatus, ')');

      const favAgents = filteredByStatus.filter(a => favSet.has(a.id));
      if(favAgents.length === 0){
        $('#favorites-grid').innerHTML = '<div class="empty-section">No favorites yet. Star some agents to see them here!</div>';
      } else {
        favAgents.forEach(agent => {
          $('#favorites-grid').appendChild(tile(agent));
        });
      }
      $('#fav-count').textContent = favAgents.length;

      // Derive categories from agents.json (normalize to lowercase for grouping)
      const categoryMap = new Map(); // Maps normalized name to original name
      filteredByStatus.forEach(a => {
        const normalized = (a.category || '').toLowerCase();
        if (normalized && !categoryMap.has(normalized)) {
          // Use the first occurrence's original case as the display name
          categoryMap.set(normalized, a.category || normalized);
        }
      });
      const categories = Array.from(categoryMap.values()).sort();
      categories.forEach(catName => {
        const normalizedCat = catName.toLowerCase();
        const section = document.createElement('div');
        section.className = 'category-section';
        const headerId = `${normalizedCat.replace(/\s+/g,'-')}-count`;
        section.innerHTML = `
          <div class="section-header" data-section="${normalizedCat}">
            <div class="section-title">
              <h2>${catName.toUpperCase()}</h2>
              <span class="section-count" id="${headerId}">0</span>
            </div>
            <span class="toggle-icon">▼</span>
          </div>
          <div class="section-grid"></div>
        `;
        const grid = section.querySelector('.section-grid');
        const catAgents = filteredByStatus.filter(a => (a.category || '').toLowerCase() === normalizedCat);
        if(catAgents.length === 0){
          grid.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-section">No agents in this category</div>';
        } else {
          catAgents.forEach(a => grid.appendChild(tile(a)));
        }
        const countEl = section.querySelector('.section-count');
        if(countEl) countEl.textContent = catAgents.length;
        section.querySelector('.section-header').addEventListener('click', (e)=>{
          const header = e.currentTarget;
          header.classList.toggle('collapsed');
          header.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle('collapsed');
        });
        $('#categoriesContainer').appendChild(section);
      });
      
      // Update project counts
      updateProjectCounts();
    }
  }
  // Expose globally so we can trigger manually or from console
  window.renderAll = renderAll;

  $$('.section-header').forEach(header => {
    header.addEventListener('click', () => {
      header.classList.toggle('collapsed');
      header.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle('collapsed');
    });
  });

  $('#searchInput').addEventListener('input', (e) => {
    searchQuery = e.target.value.toLowerCase();
    renderAll();
  });

  // Populate project filter multi-select
  // Function to calculate agent counts per project
  function getProjectCounts() {
    const counts = {};
    if (!agents || agents.length === 0) {
      return counts;
    }
    
    agents.forEach(agent => {
      // Only count agents that are enabled and deployed
      if (String(agent.state || '').toLowerCase() === 'enabled' && 
          String(agent.status || '').toLowerCase() === 'deployed') {
        const project = agent.ai_project_name;
        if (project) {
          counts[project] = (counts[project] || 0) + 1;
        }
      }
    });
    
    return counts;
  }
  
  // Function to get total count of all agents (sum of all project counts for user's projects)
  function getTotalAgentCount() {
    const projectCounts = getProjectCounts();
    // Only sum up counts for projects that are in userAIProjects
    if (!userAIProjects || userAIProjects.length === 0) {
      return 0;
    }
    return userAIProjects.reduce((sum, project) => {
      return sum + (projectCounts[project] || 0);
    }, 0);
  }
  
  // Function to update project counts in the dropdown
  function updateProjectCounts() {
    const projectCounts = getProjectCounts();
    const filterOptions = $('#projectFilterOptions');
    if (!filterOptions) return;
    
    // Update total count for "Select All"
    const selectAllCountBadge = $('#selectAllCountBadge');
    if (selectAllCountBadge) {
      const totalCount = getTotalAgentCount();
      selectAllCountBadge.textContent = totalCount;
    }
    
    // Update individual project counts
    filterOptions.querySelectorAll('.project-filter-item').forEach(item => {
      const checkbox = item.querySelector('input[type="checkbox"]');
      if (!checkbox) return;
      
      const project = checkbox.value;
      const count = projectCounts[project] || 0;
      
      let countBadge = item.querySelector('.project-count-badge');
      if (!countBadge) {
        countBadge = document.createElement('span');
        countBadge.className = 'project-count-badge';
        const label = item.querySelector('label');
        if (label) {
          label.appendChild(countBadge);
        }
      }
      countBadge.textContent = count;
    });
  }

  function populateProjectFilter() {
    const filterButton = $('#projectFilterButton');
    const filterDropdown = $('#projectFilterDropdown');
    const filterOptions = $('#projectFilterOptions');
    const selectAllCheckbox = $('#projectFilterSelectAll');
    
    console.log('🔍 Debug - Populating project filter');
    console.log('🔍 Debug - userAIProjects:', userAIProjects);
    console.log('🔍 Debug - userAIProjects length:', userAIProjects ? userAIProjects.length : 0);
    
    if (!filterButton || !filterDropdown || !filterOptions) {
      console.error('❌ Project filter elements not found!');
      return;
    }
    
    if (!userAIProjects || userAIProjects.length === 0) {
      console.warn('⚠️ No user AI projects found');
      filterButton.textContent = 'No Projects Available';
      return;
    }
    
    // By default, select all projects
    selectedProjects = [...userAIProjects];
    updateFilterButtonText();
    
    // Clear existing options
    filterOptions.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Get project counts
    const projectCounts = getProjectCounts();
    
    // Update total count for "Select All"
    const selectAllCountBadge = $('#selectAllCountBadge');
    if (selectAllCountBadge) {
      const totalCount = getTotalAgentCount();
      selectAllCountBadge.textContent = totalCount;
    }
    
    // Add project checkboxes
    userAIProjects.forEach(project => {
      if (project) { // Only add non-empty project names
        const item = document.createElement('div');
        item.className = 'project-filter-item';
        
        const checkbox = document.createElement('input');
        checkbox.type = 'checkbox';
        checkbox.id = `projectFilter_${project}`;
        checkbox.value = project;
        checkbox.checked = true; // All selected by default
        checkbox.addEventListener('change', handleProjectFilterChange);
        
        const label = document.createElement('label');
        label.htmlFor = checkbox.id;
        
        const projectName = document.createTextNode(project);
        label.appendChild(projectName);
        
        const countBadge = document.createElement('span');
        countBadge.className = 'project-count-badge';
        countBadge.textContent = projectCounts[project] || 0;
        label.appendChild(countBadge);
        
        item.appendChild(checkbox);
        item.appendChild(label);
        filterOptions.appendChild(item);
        
        console.log('✅ Added project option:', project, 'with count:', projectCounts[project] || 0);
      }
    });
    
    // Select All checkbox handler
    selectAllCheckbox.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
      const isChecked = e.target.checked;
      const checkboxes = filterOptions.querySelectorAll('input[type="checkbox"]');
      checkboxes.forEach(cb => {
        cb.checked = isChecked;
      });
      
      if (isChecked) {
        selectedProjects = [...userAIProjects];
      } else {
        selectedProjects = [];
      }
      updateFilterButtonText();
      renderAll();
    });
    
    // Toggle dropdown
    filterButton.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      e.stopPropagation();
      const isOpen = filterDropdown.classList.contains('show');
      if (isOpen) {
        filterDropdown.classList.remove('show');
        filterButton.classList.remove('open');
      } else {
        filterDropdown.classList.add('show');
        filterButton.classList.add('open');
      }
    });
    
    // Close dropdown when clicking outside
    document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      if (!filterButton.contains(e.target) && !filterDropdown.contains(e.target)) {
        filterDropdown.classList.remove('show');
        filterButton.classList.remove('open');
      }
    });
    
    console.log('✅ Project filter populated with', userAIProjects.length, 'projects');
  }
  
  function handleProjectFilterChange(e) {
    const project = e.target.value;
    const isChecked = e.target.checked;
    
    if (isChecked) {
      if (!selectedProjects.includes(project)) {
        selectedProjects.push(project);
      }
    } else {
      selectedProjects = selectedProjects.filter(p => p !== project);
    }
    
    // Update Select All checkbox
    const selectAllCheckbox = $('#projectFilterSelectAll');
    const allCheckboxes = $('#projectFilterOptions').querySelectorAll('input[type="checkbox"]');
    const allChecked = Array.from(allCheckboxes).every(cb => cb.checked);
    selectAllCheckbox.checked = allChecked;
    
    updateFilterButtonText();
    renderAll();
  }
  
  function updateFilterButtonText() {
    const filterButton = $('#projectFilterButton');
    if (!filterButton) return;
    
    if (selectedProjects.length === 0) {
      filterButton.textContent = 'No Projects Selected';
    } else if (selectedProjects.length === userAIProjects.length) {
      filterButton.textContent = 'All Projects';
    } else if (selectedProjects.length === 1) {
      filterButton.textContent = selectedProjects[0];
    } else {
      filterButton.textContent = `${selectedProjects.length} Projects Selected`;
    }
  }
  
  // Populate filter when DOM is ready
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', populateProjectFilter);
  } else {
    // DOM is already ready
    populateProjectFilter();
  }
  
let currentImageIndex = 0;
let currentImages = [];

function openImageModal(src, name) {
  const modal = document.getElementById("imgModal");
  const modalImg = document.getElementById("imgModalContent");
  const caption = document.getElementById("imgModalCaption");
  const closeBtn = document.getElementById("imgModalClose");
  const prevBtn = document.getElementById("imgModalPrev");
  const nextBtn = document.getElementById("imgModalNext");

  // collect all visible images in current gallery
  currentImages = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".image-gallery img"));
  currentImageIndex = currentImages.findIndex(img => img.src === src);

  modal.style.display = "block";
  modalImg.src = src;
  caption.textContent = name || '';

  updateArrowState(); // ✅ disable arrows if needed

  closeBtn.onclick = () => closeImageModal();
  prevBtn.onclick = showPrevImage;
  nextBtn.onclick = showNextImage;

  modal.onclick = e => {
    if (e.target === modal) closeImageModal();
  };
}

function showPrevImage() {
  if (currentImageIndex > 0) {
    currentImageIndex--;
    const img = currentImages[currentImageIndex];
    openImageModal(img.src, img.alt);
  }
}

function showNextImage() {
  if (currentImageIndex < currentImages.length - 1) {
    currentImageIndex++;
    const img = currentImages[currentImageIndex];
    openImageModal(img.src, img.alt);
  }
}

function updateArrowState() {
  const prevBtn = document.getElementById("imgModalPrev");
  const nextBtn = document.getElementById("imgModalNext");

  prevBtn.style.opacity = currentImageIndex === 0 ? "0.3" : "1";
  prevBtn.style.pointerEvents = currentImageIndex === 0 ? "none" : "auto";

  nextBtn.style.opacity = currentImageIndex === currentImages.length - 1 ? "0.3" : "1";
  nextBtn.style.pointerEvents = currentImageIndex === currentImages.length - 1 ? "none" : "auto";
}

function closeImageModal() {
  const modal = document.getElementById("imgModal");
  modal.style.display = "none";
  document.getElementById("imgModalContent").src = '';
}



async function openDocModal(url, name, type) {
  const modal = document.getElementById("docModal");
  const frame = document.getElementById("docModalFrame");
  const caption = document.getElementById("docModalCaption");
  const closeBtn = document.getElementById("docModalClose");
  const textEl = document.getElementById("docModalText");
  const markdownEl = document.getElementById("docModalMarkdown");
  const wrapper = document.getElementById("docModalContentWrapper");

  // Reset views
  frame.style.display = "none";
  wrapper.style.display = "none";
  textEl.textContent = '';
  markdownEl.innerHTML = '';

  modal.style.display = "block";
  caption.textContent = name + (type ? ` (${type.toUpperCase()})` : '');

  try {
    // Fetch the file as blob first (handles .data files)
    const response = await fetch(url);
    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Failed to fetch document: ${response.status}`);
    }
    
    const blob = await response.blob();
    
    // Determine content type from file type or blob
    // Map file type to MIME type (important for .data files)
    const mimeTypes = {
      'pdf': 'application/pdf',
      'txt': 'text/plain',
      'md': 'text/markdown',
      'html': 'text/html',
      'json': 'application/json',
      'xml': 'application/xml',
      'csv': 'text/csv',
      'doc': 'application/msword',
      'docx': 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document'
    };
    
    let contentType = blob.type;
    if (!contentType || contentType === 'application/octet-stream') {
      contentType = mimeTypes[type] || 'application/octet-stream';
    }
    
    // Create a new blob with correct MIME type if needed (important for PDFs from .data files)
    const typedBlob = contentType !== blob.type ? new Blob([blob], { type: contentType }) : blob;
    
    // Create blob URL for display
    const blobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(typedBlob);
    
    if (type === 'pdf') {
      // Show PDF in iframe using blob URL
      frame.src = blobUrl;
      frame.style.display = "block";
    } 
    else if (type === 'txt' || type === 'md' || type === 'html' || type === 'json' || type === 'xml' || type === 'csv') {
      // Fetch and render text-based files
      const text = await blob.text();
      wrapper.style.display = "block";
      if (type === 'md') {
        // render markdown → basic HTML formatting
        markdownEl.innerHTML = renderMarkdown(text);
        markdownEl.style.display = "block";
        textEl.style.display = "none";
      } else {
        textEl.textContent = text;
        textEl.style.display = "block";
        markdownEl.style.display = "none";
      }
    } 
    else {
      // For other file types, try to display in iframe
      frame.src = blobUrl;
      frame.style.display = "block";
    }
    
    // Clean up blob URL when modal closes
    closeBtn.onclick = function() {
      modal.style.display = "none";
      frame.src = '';
      URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl);
    };

    modal.onclick = function(e) {
      if (e.target === modal) {
        modal.style.display = "none";
        frame.src = '';
        URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl);
      }
    };
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Error loading document:', err);
    wrapper.style.display = "block";
    textEl.textContent = 'Error loading document: ' + err.message;
    textEl.style.display = "block";
    
    closeBtn.onclick = function() {
      modal.style.display = "none";
      frame.src = '';
    };

    modal.onclick = function(e) {
      if (e.target === modal) {
        modal.style.display = "none";
        frame.src = '';
      }
    };
  }
}

// simple markdown renderer (headings, bold, italics, links, lists)
function renderMarkdown(md) {
  let html = md
    .replace(/^### (.*$)/gim, '<h3>$1</h3>')
    .replace(/^## (.*$)/gim, '<h2>$1</h2>')
    .replace(/^# (.*$)/gim, '<h1>$1</h1>')
    .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/gim, '<b>$1</b>')
    .replace(/\*(.*?)\*/gim, '<i>$1</i>')
    .replace(/\[(.*?)\]\((.*?)\)/gim, '<a href="$2" target="_blank">$1</a>')
    .replace(/^\s*[-*] (.*$)/gim, '<ul><li>$1</li></ul>')
    .replace(/\n$/gim, '<br />');
  
  // Merge adjacent <ul> tags (for multiple list items)
  html = html.replace(/<\/ul>\s*<ul>/g, '');
  return html.trim();
}

function openVideoModal(url, title) {
  const modal = document.getElementById("videoModal");
  const player = document.getElementById("videoModalPlayer");
  const caption = document.getElementById("videoModalCaption");
  const closeBtn = document.getElementById("videoModalClose");

  if (!modal || !player) {
    console.error('Video modal elements not found');
    return;
  }

  console.log('Opening video modal with URL:', url);

  modal.style.display = "block";
  
  // Reset video element completely
  player.pause();
  player.currentTime = 0;
  player.removeAttribute('src');
  
  // Remove existing source elements
  const existingSources = player.querySelectorAll('source');
  existingSources.forEach(src => src.remove());
  
  // Clear any previous error handlers
  player.onerror = null;
  player.onloadstart = null;
  player.onloadedmetadata = null;
  player.oncanplay = null;
  player.onloadeddata = null;
  
  // Try to detect video type from URL extension
  let videoType = 'video/mp4'; // default
  const urlLower = url.toLowerCase();
  if (urlLower.includes('.webm')) {
    videoType = 'video/webm';
  } else if (urlLower.includes('.ogg') || urlLower.includes('.ogv')) {
    videoType = 'video/ogg';
  } else if (urlLower.includes('.mov')) {
    videoType = 'video/quicktime';
  } else if (urlLower.includes('.avi')) {
    videoType = 'video/x-msvideo';
  } else if (urlLower.includes('.mkv')) {
    videoType = 'video/x-matroska';
  }
  
  // Set up error handling FIRST before loading
  player.onerror = function(e) {
    console.error('Video playback error:', e, player.error);
    let errorMsg = 'Unable to load video';
    if (player.error) {
      switch(player.error.code) {
        case player.error.MEDIA_ERR_ABORTED:
          errorMsg = 'Video loading aborted';
          break;
        case player.error.MEDIA_ERR_NETWORK:
          errorMsg = 'Network error loading video';
          break;
        case player.error.MEDIA_ERR_DECODE:
          errorMsg = 'Video decoding error';
          break;
        case player.error.MEDIA_ERR_SRC_NOT_SUPPORTED:
          errorMsg = 'Video format not supported';
          break;
        default:
          errorMsg = `Error ${player.error.code}: ${player.error.message || 'Unknown error'}`;
      }
    }
    caption.textContent = title + ' - ' + errorMsg;
    caption.style.color = '#ff4444';
  };
  
  // Try setting src directly first (simpler approach)
  try {
  player.src = url;
    player.load();
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error setting video source:', error);
    // Fallback: use source element
    const sourceElement = document.createElement('source');
    sourceElement.src = url;
    sourceElement.type = videoType;
    player.appendChild(sourceElement);
    player.load();
  }
  
  // Reset caption
  caption.textContent = title;
  caption.style.color = '#fff';
  
  // Handle load start
  player.onloadstart = function() {
    console.log('Video loading started');
    caption.textContent = title + ' - Loading...';
    caption.style.color = '#fff';
  };
  
  // Handle loaded metadata
  player.onloadedmetadata = function() {
    console.log('Video metadata loaded, duration:', player.duration);
    caption.textContent = title;
    caption.style.color = '#fff';
  };
  
  // Handle canplay event and auto-play
  player.oncanplay = function() {
    console.log('Video can play');
    caption.textContent = title;
    caption.style.color = '#fff';
    // Try to auto-play the video
    const playPromise = player.play();
    if (playPromise !== undefined) {
      playPromise.catch(error => {
        console.log('Auto-play was prevented:', error);
        // Browser prevented autoplay, user will need to click play button
        caption.textContent = title + ' - Click play to start';
      });
    }
  };
  
  // Handle loaded data
  player.onloadeddata = function() {
    console.log('Video data loaded');
    // Try to auto-play if canplay didn't trigger it
    if (player.paused) {
      const playPromise = player.play();
      if (playPromise !== undefined) {
        playPromise.catch(error => {
          console.log('Auto-play on loadeddata was prevented:', error);
        });
      }
    }
  };

  closeBtn.onclick = function() {
    modal.style.display = "none";
    player.pause();
    player.currentTime = 0;
    // Clear sources
    const sources = player.querySelectorAll('source');
    sources.forEach(src => src.remove());
    player.src = '';
  };

  modal.onclick = function(e) {
    if (e.target === modal || e.target === closeBtn) {
      modal.style.display = "none";
      player.pause();
      player.currentTime = 0;
      // Clear sources
      const sources = player.querySelectorAll('source');
      sources.forEach(src => src.remove());
      player.src = '';
    }
  };
  
  // Prevent video clicks from closing modal
  player.onclick = function(e) {
    e.stopPropagation();
  };
}

document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  const modal = document.getElementById('imgModal');
  if (modal.style.display !== 'block') return;
  if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') showPrevImage();
  if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') showNextImage();
  if (e.key === 'Escape') closeImageModal();
});

  loadData();
